level.setting: An abandoned medieval monastery cloistered in suffocating, toxic mist

encounters.hazard: Shattering stained glass windows that rain razor-sharp shards

pickup.name: Phosphorus Extract
pickup.effect: Adds explosive fire damage to chemical mixtures

encounters.trigger: Picking up the Phosphorus Extract causes the chapel floor to collapse, dropping the player into the catacombs where the next monster stirs

encounters.hazard: Pockets of combustible sewer gas that detonate when exposed to sparks

pickup.name: Silver Nitrate Solute
pickup.effect: Corrodes and burns unholy tissue instantly

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Ghoul causes its acidic blood to burn through a locked iron gate, revealing the path to the Flooded Crypt

encounters.hazard: Deep, freezing water that slows player movement and drains stamina

pickup.name: Calcified Basilisk Eye
pickup.effect: Emits a petrifying light beam when dissolved in vitriol

encounters.trigger: Grabbing the Calcified Basilisk Eye triggers a sudden, violent earthquake that cracks the main crypt wall, exposing the inner sanctum of the boss

boss.name: The Amalgamated Abbot
boss.victory_condition: Dissolve the boss's petrified stone heart using the Vitriol Caster once it has been exposed by the Calcified Basilisk Eye

level.objective: Purge the heretical experiments from the monastery and retrieve the Alchemical Codex of the Saint
level.reward: Unlocks the 'Master Alchemist' specialty tree and the blueprint for the 'Aetheric Catalyst' gun

level.setting: Ominous, ash-choked catacombs deep beneath a ruined cathedral

encounters.hazard: Sulfur vents that erupt when moving too quickly

pickup.name: Vial of Consecrated Oil
pickup.effect: Coat weapon to add holy burning damage to the next strikes

encounters.trigger: Approaching the altar at the end of the crypts opens a trapdoor leading down to the Embalming Chambers.

encounters.hazard: Pools of toxic embalming fluid that slow movement and drain health

pickup.name: Searing Brand of the Zealot
pickup.effect: Permanently increases fire spell radius and ignites stone barriers

encounters.trigger: Burning the canvas painting of the saint unlocks the heavy iron gate to the Bone Vaults.

encounters.hazard: Shattering skeletal remains that explode into sharp bone shards

pickup.name: Ashen Phylactery
pickup.effect: Provides absolute immunity to necrotic rot for a short duration

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wight shatters the floor, plunging the player directly into the Sanctum of the Flayed Priest.

boss.name: The Flayed Priest
boss.victory_condition: Crush the Ashen Phylactery to neutralize the priest's necrotic aura, rendering him vulnerable to a final fire strike.

level.objective: Navigate the suffocating darkness of the cathedral dungeons to purge the ancient necrotic corruption.
level.reward: The legendary Mantle of the True Pyromancer, granting immunity to self-inflicted blast damage.

level.setting: The Whispering Crypts of the Sunken Cathedral

encounters.hazard: Sinking toxic mire that slows movement speed

pickup.name: Vial of Luminescent Bile
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and dissolves organic barriers

encounters.trigger: A rusted iron grate in the floor collapses under the ghoul's weight, revealing a dark tunnel that leads down to the ossuary.

encounters.hazard: Spontaneous collapses of bone piles causing physical damage

pickup.name: Consecrated Oil
pickup.effect: Coats the weapon to add fire damage and bypass supernatural defenses

encounters.trigger: The dying screech of the Chamber Stalker shatters the stained-glass window at the back of the chamber, exposing a narrow ledge leading to the belfry.

encounters.hazard: Gales of wind that threaten to blow the player off the precarious stone ledge

pickup.name: Silver-Tipped Stake
pickup.effect: A heavy projectile capable of piercing the hardened armor of ancient vampires

encounters.trigger: The gargoyle crumbles into stone rubble, crashing through the floor of the belfry into the hidden sanctuary where the boss awaits.

boss.name: Baron Von Karas, The Blind Sanguine
boss.victory_condition: Pierce the exposed heart of the Baron with the Silver-Tipped Stake when he channels his blood-shield.

level.objective: Purge the ancestral cathedral of its vampiric taint and reclaim the lost relic.
level.reward: The Sanguine Amulet, which grants life-steal capabilities to the Shadowblade.

level.setting: An abandoned, mist-shrouded frontier outpost in a dead forest.

encounters.hazard: Crumbling wooden floorboards with rusted spikes below.

pickup.name: Phial of Consecrated Oil
pickup.effect: When applied to the bow string, infuses the next few arrows with purifying holy flame.

encounters.trigger: Picking up the Phial of Consecrated Oil triggers a distant, agonizing shriek from the nearby stables.

encounters.hazard: Choking black mold spores that obscure vision and slowly drain health.

pickup.name: Quiver of Phosphor Arrows
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and burns through shadow-infused armor.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wendigo causes its ribcage to burst open, revealing a key that unlocks the passage to the underground crypts.

encounters.hazard: Grasping skeletal hands reaching up from shallow, muddy graves.

pickup.name: Sunburst Sigil
pickup.effect: A radiant amulet that emits a piercing pulse of true sunlight when shattered.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the specter's core unseals the heavy iron doors to the inner sanctum where the entity resides.

boss.name: The Hollow Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Sunburst Sigil to permanently strip the Monarch of his shadow shield, then defeat him with the Silvered Longbow.

level.objective: Purge the malevolent entities from the outpost and seal the abyssal rift in the inner sanctum.
level.reward: The Hunter's Resolve: A legendary ranger pendant that grants permanent immunity to terror effects and increases critical strike chance in darkness.

level.setting: A decaying, subterranean mausoleum beneath a forgotten cathedral, shrouded in a heavy, luminescent green fog.

encounters.hazard: Crumbling stone pillars that drop debris if disturbed

pickup.name: Ethereal Ash Flask
pickup.effect: Empowers magical projectile attacks with freezing frost

encounters.trigger: A secret iron gate slides open in the wall, revealing the path down to the Drowned Catacombs.

encounters.hazard: Rising murky water that slows down movement speed

pickup.name: Grave-Dust Talisman
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary shielding barrier that reflects necrotic energy

encounters.trigger: The ghoul's defeat causes a heavy stone lever to drop, draining the flooded tunnel leading to the Embalming Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Slick pools of embalming fluid that are highly flammable

pickup.name: Scepter of the Soul-Binder
pickup.effect: Fires a beam of pure essence that disrupts ancient dark magic

encounters.trigger: A massive, bone-chiseled portal hums to life at the back of the chamber, opening the passage to the Sanctum of the Defiler.

boss.name: Arch-Necromancer Malakar
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt Malakar's dark ritual by channeling the Scepter of the Soul-Binder directly into his hovering shadow orbs.

level.objective: Navigate the crypts to stop Arch-Necromancer Malakar before he completes the ritual of the eternal night.
level.reward: The Grim Grimoire, unlocking the tier-2 summoning spells for the Necromancer.

level.setting: A collapsing, blood-soaked subterranean asylum under a chaotic siren blare.

encounters.hazard: Bursting steam pipes spraying scalding hot water.

pickup.name: Phosphor Flare
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and causes extreme heat irritation to shadows.

encounters.trigger: A structural collapse blocks the exit, forcing the player to drop through a floor grate into the Boiler Room.

encounters.hazard: Piles of active, unpredictable exploding coal embers.

pickup.name: Defibrillator Battery
pickup.effect: Discharges a high-voltage electrical current upon impact.

encounters.trigger: An explosion blasts open the heavy iron blast doors, revealing a flooded medical laboratory.

encounters.hazard: Deep, electrified water currents flowing with loose medical waste.

pickup.name: Concentrated Adrenaline Serum
pickup.effect: Temporarily triples physical strength and negates pain receptors.

encounters.trigger: The ceiling collapses entirely, exposing the elevator shaft leading directly up to the Warden's Observation Tower.

boss.name: The Screaming Warden
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Concentrated Adrenaline Serum directly into the Warden's exposed heart valve to induce cardiac arrest, then decapitate him.

level.objective: Survive the brutal, chaotic descent and execute the Warden to stop the asylum's self-destruct cycle.
level.reward: Unlocks the 'Berserker's Rage' permanent passive ability and the 'Warden's Key' weapon cosmetic skin.

level.setting: An abandoned, mist-shrouded botanical greenhouse humming with soft, melodic wind chimes.

encounters.hazard: Toxic pollen clouds that obscure vision and slow movement

pickup.name: Luminescent Pollen Dust
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible paths and neutralizes shadow armor

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the heavy glass doors to the Fern Atrium activates a rhythmic thudding deep within the foliage

encounters.hazard: Slick, wet moss tiles that cause sliding and falling into thorny pit traps

pickup.name: Vial of Concentrated Sap
pickup.effect: Acts as an extreme adhesive and dissolves crystallized outer shells

encounters.trigger: The collapse of a rotting wooden archway forces the player into the submerged Lily Gardens

encounters.hazard: Freezing shallow water that drains stamina if standing still

pickup.name: Sun-Infused Root
pickup.effect: Emits an intense burst of solar heat when crushed

encounters.trigger: Shattering the final frozen lily gate triggers the violent descent of the greenhouse's central dome

boss.name: The Great Weeping Willow
boss.victory_condition: Crush the Sun-Infused Root to ignite the willow's frozen heart, then strike it with the Purifying Bell.

level.objective: Silence the corrupted heartbeat of the greenhouse and restore peace to the botanical sanctuary.
level.reward: The Warden's Solar Signet, which permanently increases health regeneration in tranquil zones.

level.setting: An abandoned, neon-lit carnival grounds haunted by sentient confectionery and toy monsters.

encounters.hazard: Spinning, rusted carousel horses with glowing red eyes.

pickup.name: Jar of Sour Pixie Dust
pickup.effect: Dissolves sticky or sugary substances instantly.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Blob opens the path to the Funhouse, where a faint, mocking laughter can be heard.

encounters.hazard: Mirrors that project terrifying, distorted reflections that temporarily blind the player.

pickup.name: Peppermint Shield Charm
pickup.effect: Generates a minty aura that repels heat and fire.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Taffy Spider's web reveals the keycard to the Prize Booth backroom.

encounters.hazard: Shelves of combusting teddy bears raining down sparks.

pickup.name: Ultra-Sticky Caramel Lasso
pickup.effect: Can trap or gum up giant, heavy mechanical components.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's ashes melt the lock on the rusted iron gate leading directly to the Big Top Tent.

boss.name: Baron Von Honk, the Clockwork Clown
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ultra-Sticky Caramel Lasso to jam the clockwork gears on the Baron's back, freezing him in place forever.

level.objective: Navigate the whimsical carnival, defeat the twisted confections, and stop the Clockwork Clown from releasing his nightmare gas.
level.reward: The Master Illusionist's Top Hat, which permanently grants the player the ability to manifest physical clones.

level.setting: A chaotic, collapsing airship assembly yard with rupturing steam pipes and spinning brass gears.

encounters.hazard: Rupturing steam pipes spraying scalding fog

pickup.name: Acidic Lubricant Flask
pickup.effect: Corrodes heavy metal plating and slows mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: A severed power line from the defeated drone sparks, igniting the fuel line leading to the Furnace Room.

encounters.hazard: Overflowing cauldrons of molten copper splashing onto the walkways

pickup.name: High-Voltage Capacitor
pickup.effect: Discharges a massive electromagnetic pulse

encounters.trigger: The falling debris of the Golem crushes the support struts of the elevator, dropping the player into the lower Generator Core.

encounters.hazard: Unstable electrical arcs jumping between floor grates

pickup.name: Supercharged Boiler Valve Key
pickup.effect: Allows manual venting of high-pressure steam turbines

encounters.trigger: The explosion of the Dynamo Beetle activates the emergency override system, opening the blast doors to the Bridge.

boss.name: Iron Dreadnought Mech
boss.victory_condition: Vent the high-pressure steam turbines directly onto the Mech's main radiator core using the Valve Key.

level.objective: Navigate through the chaotic assembly yard, neutralize the rogue automatons, and disable the out-of-control Iron Dreadnought Mech.
level.reward: The legendary Prototype Jetpack blueprint and the rank of Grand Architect.

level.setting: The Subterranean Clockwork Vaults of New London

encounters.hazard: Searing Overheated Steam Vents

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Phial
pickup.effect: Melts heavy metals and lubricates rusted locks

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the central pressure gate reveals a path leading deeper into the flooded cogworks.

encounters.hazard: Spinning Submerged Razor Cogs

pickup.name: Superconductive Copper Core
pickup.effect: Amplifies electrical energy outputs significantly

encounters.trigger: Activating the auxiliary backup generator floods the lower levels with high voltage, opening the vault hatch.

encounters.hazard: Bubbling Pools of Molten Slag

pickup.name: Pneumatic Freeze Discharger
pickup.effect: Instantly solidifies superheated surfaces and machinery

encounters.trigger: Disabling the safety lock on the crucible causes an explosion that blows open the doors to the Grand Clockwork Throne.

boss.name: The Chronos Engine
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the main gear shaft using the Pneumatic Freeze Discharger, then shatter it with the Lightning-Infused Tesla Wrench.

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen blueprints of the Prime Regulator from the core of the Rogue Clockwork Keep before the city's infrastructure collapses.
level.reward: The title of Grand Artificer and the legendary Eternal Spring Blueprint.

level.setting: The Floating Clockwork Greenhouse of Dr. Bumble

encounters.hazard: Gears that periodically spray boiling, aromatic lavender tea

pickup.name: Congealed Copper Grease
pickup.effect: Temporarily lubricates stiff mechanisms and dissolves clockwork joints

encounters.trigger: Inserting the rusted beetle's central gear into the conservatory console opens the automated hatch leading to the Sky-Docking Bay.

encounters.hazard: Gusts of wind from malfunctioning copper exhaust fans

pickup.name: Spark-Inducing Phlogistic Powder
pickup.effect: Causes unstable steam valves to instantly over-pressurize and detonate

encounters.trigger: Using the defeated vulture's battery cell to power the magnetic lift triggers an ascent to the Main Control Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Swinging pendulum blades styled like giant brass pocket watches

pickup.name: Concentrated Solvent of Dr. Bumble
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced brass plating upon impact

encounters.trigger: An alarm klaxon sounds as the sentry falls, causing the central glass dome to shatter and revealing the grand laboratory of the boss.

boss.name: Grandmaster Clockwork Alchemist-Bot
boss.victory_condition: Splash the boss with the Concentrated Solvent to dissolve its reinforced outer armor, making it vulnerable to a final shot from your Seltzer-Infused Acid Spitter.

level.objective: Retrieve Dr. Bumble's stolen Golden Perpetuum Mobile device from the malfunctioning rogue automata.
level.reward: The Legendary Alchemical Blueprints for the Ever-Bubbling Elixir of Flight

level.setting: The Steam-Choked Under-Grid of New London

encounters.hazard: Rhythmically crushing steam pistons

pickup.name: Supercharged Capacitor
pickup.effect: Modifies weapon to discharge high-voltage blasts

encounters.trigger: A short-circuit in the disabled Sentry blows open the heavy ventilation shaft leading to the Refinery.

encounters.hazard: Leaking superheated copper pipes

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Coat blade to melt hardened brass plating

encounters.trigger: The Goliath's death explosion ruptures the fuel line, forcing the player to drop into the subterranean chemical drains.

encounters.hazard: Slippery toxic sludge pools

pickup.name: Overcharged Boiler Core
pickup.effect: Can be detonated to disrupt massive mechanical systems

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Skinner unlocks the hydraulic pressure elevator that ascends directly to the Grand Engine Room.

boss.name: The Iron Dreadnought Colossus
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Overcharged Boiler Core inside the Colossus's main exhaust port while surviving the sweeping shredder blades.

level.objective: Infiltrate the high-security subterranean grid and sabotage the city's corrupt power source.
level.reward: The Master-Key Sprocket and the title of Shadow Saboteur of New London.

level.setting: The Whispering Gearworks, an abandoned sky-foundry suspended in perpetual, lightning-scarred smog.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured high-pressure steam pipes venting at irregular intervals.

pickup.name: Condenser Fluid
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the weapon to freeze and brittle metal targets.

encounters.trigger: A sudden drop in steam pressure opens the reinforced blast doors leading to the Smelting Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Splashes of liquid brass from overflowing crucibles.

pickup.name: Grounded Galvanic Battery
pickup.effect: Empowers the next electrical strike with immense voltage.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's core detonates upon defeat, shattering the floor and dropping the player into the Catalyst Core.

enemy.name: Smog-Weaver Drone
enemy.weakness: Grounded Galvanic Battery discharged into its intake vents

encounters.hazard: Choking sulfurous clouds that obscure vision and inflict damage over time.

pickup.name: Aetheric Rod
pickup.effect: A conductive rod that channels atmospheric pressure into localized lightning storms.

encounters.trigger: The drone crashes into the central power regulator, activating the main elevator to the Overseer's Observatory.

boss.name: Arch-Mechanist Clockwork Colossus
boss.weakness: Aetheric Rod used to attract storm strikes to its main clockwork gear
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the central mainspring gear using the Aetheric Rod during a lightning surge.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing sky-foundry, disable the automated defenses, and dismantle the corrupt Clockwork Colossus.
level.reward: The Arch-Mechanist's Lightning Core, unlocking the advanced 'Tempest Lord' subclass.

level.setting: An abandoned, rust-covered clockwork metropolis shrouded in perpetual copper fog.

encounters.hazard: Leaking superheated steam pipes

pickup.name: Electro-Magnetic Disrupter
pickup.effect: Discharges localized EMP pulses that can short-circuit shielding

encounters.trigger: After defeating the Automaton, its central core overloads, blasting open the heavy brass vault doors to the Smelting District.

encounters.hazard: Slick puddles of unstable chemical oil

pickup.name: Chronos-Infused Liquid Nitrogen
pickup.effect: Instantly freezes moving gears and brittle metal alloys

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Sentry Drone triggers a security lockdown override, dropping a hydraulic elevator down into the sub-basement archives.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris and crumbling iron bookshelves

pickup.name: Aether-Charged Paradox Core
pickup.effect: Allows the user to tear through spatial-temporal distortion fields

encounters.trigger: The Archivist collapses into a heap of gears, activating a mechanical conveyor belt that carries the player directly to the grand Observatory platform.

boss.name: Grand Chronometer Goliath
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Goliath's temporal engine by detonating the Aether-Charged Paradox Core inside its chest cavity.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate, decaying ruins of the clockwork city to retrieve the stolen Chronos Matrix and stop the temporal collapse.
level.reward: The Master Temporal Sigil, granting permanent time-dilation capabilities.

level.setting: An eerie, abandoned clockwork observatory operating silently under a smog-choked, starless sky.

encounters.hazard: Pressurized steam vents bursting unpredictably from copper pipes.

pickup.name: Vial of Corrosive Vitriol
pickup.effect: Melts heavy alloy plating on impact.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the automaton's brass core into the console opens the heavy bulkhead to the Orrery.

encounters.hazard: Scything brass orbits swinging blindly through the room's center.

pickup.name: Resonating Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Vibrates intensely at frequencies capable of shattering hardened glass.

encounters.trigger: Scaling the shattered framework of the solar system model leads the player to the high rafters.

encounters.hazard: A crumbling floor of rotting timber and exposed, high-voltage copper wiring.

pickup.name: Magnetite Core Charger
pickup.effect: Infuses weapons with a powerful localized gravitational pull.

encounters.trigger: The chimera's death throes collapse the central floorboards, plunging the player into the subterranean engine chamber.

boss.name: Grand Archon Ironheart
boss.victory_condition: Magnetize Ironheart's iron plating to pull down the massive overhead copper flywheel, crushing him instantly.

level.objective: Navigate the eerie observatory, bypass the mechanical monstrosities, and neutralize the crazed steam-engine tyrant at the core.
level.reward: The legendary tectonic astrolabe, unlocking advanced geo-magnetic abilities.

level.setting: The Whispering Gardens of Brass, a peaceful floating greenhouse filled with clockwork butterflies and gentle steam mists.

encounters.hazard: Leaking hot water pipes

pickup.name: Vial of Sacred Condensate
pickup.effect: Applies a holy water coating to weapons, weakening copper-plated enemies.

encounters.trigger: A keycard drops from the drone, unlocking the elevator to the Upper Arboretum.

encounters.hazard: Drifting spores that temporarily obscure vision

pickup.name: Piston-Charged Sun-Crystal
pickup.effect: Emits a concentrated beam of divine, superheated solar light.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the apiary keeper opens the security barrier blockading the Sunken Orchid Conservatory.

encounters.hazard: Overcharged electrostatic mist

pickup.name: Aegis Clockwork Cog
pickup.effect: Creates a spinning divine shield that deflects gears and reflects laser beams.

encounters.trigger: The hound's collar contains the access code to open the grand vault door where the Great Mechanist rests.

boss.name: The Clockwork Architect
boss.victory_condition: Deflect the Architect's central gear barrage back at its power core using the Aegis Clockwork Cog.

level.objective: Purify the corrupt steam core in the heart of the serene sky-gardens.
level.reward: The Gilded Heart Engine, a legendary paladin relic that enhances divine defense.
